brand.name: Wavefella
brand.description: Water sports equipment manufacturer — inflatable SUP boards, kayaks, dinghies, RIBs, safety equipment, and accessories.

products.name: SUP Tour 12'
products.summary: 12 ft touring SUP for distance paddling. Displacement hull with drop-stitch core.
products.description: A 12 ft touring inflatable SUP board optimized for speed, tracking, and covering distance. Pointed displacement hull, 30" width, reinforced drop-stitch construction.

specs.label: Included
specs.value: Backpack, pump, fin, leash, repair kit

products.name: SUP Explorer 11'
products.summary: Stable 11 ft inflatable SUP for beginners. Wide-body design with drop-stitch core.
products.description: An 11 ft all-around inflatable SUP board built for stability and ease of use. 32" wide platform, drop-stitch core at 12-15 PSI, complete with backpack pump and fin.

specs.label: Included
specs.value: Backpack, pump, fin, leash, repair kit

products.name: RIB 450 Patrol
products.summary: 4.5 m aluminium-hull patrol RIB. Heavy-duty build, suitable for commercial operators.
products.description: The 450 Patrol is a 4.5 m aluminium RIB built for commercial work —?dive operators, coastguard auxiliaries, harbour pilots. Reinforced hull, Hypalon tube, custom console.

products.name: RIB 330
products.summary: Compact 3.3 m aluminium-hull RIB, ideal as a yacht tender or a recreational day boat.
products.description: A versatile 3.3 m RIB with a 1.2 mm PVC tube, aluminium hull and a 15 hp outboard class. Light enough to lift on davits, stable enough for four adults, and small enough to garage.

products.name: Dual-Action Pump
products.summary: High-volume dual-action hand pump for rapid inflation of SUPs, kayaks, and dinghies.
products.description: Dual-action hand pump that moves air on both push and pull strokes. Built-in pressure gauge. Includes multiple valve adapters for Halkey-Roberts, Boston, and leaf-valve types.

products.name: Carbon Paddle
products.summary: Lightweight adjustable carbon-fiber paddle for SUP and kayaking.
products.description: Full carbon-fiber shaft with nylon blade. Adjustable from 170 cm to 220 cm. Tool-free ferrule mechanism. Weighs only 24 oz.

products.name: Oars & Pump Set
products.summary: Pair of 1.6 m aluminium oars and a 5 L high-flow foot pump. Fits all inflatables in the range.
products.description: Spare or replacement oars and pump. 1.6 m aluminium oars with plastic blade, 5 L high-flow foot pump with pressure gauge.

products.name: Life Vest Pro
products.summary: SOLAS-compliant automatic inflatable life vest for offshore and rescue operations.
products.description: Professional-grade life vest with automatic hydrostatic inflation. SOLAS compliant with spray hood, waterproof light, and lifting harness attachment.

specs.label: Features
specs.value: Spray hood, waterproof light, lifting harness, whistle

products.name: Life Vest Classic
products.summary: CE and ISO certified universal buoyancy aid for recreational water sports.
products.description: Foam-filled life vest with adjustable straps, whistle, reflective strips, and rescue handle. CE certified to ISO 12402. Available in multiple sizes.

products.name: Inflatable Kayak Tandem
products.summary: Two-person inflatable kayak for family recreation. Stable and portable.
products.description: A 12 ft two-person inflatable kayak with separate cockpits and adjustable seats. Drop-stitch floor, removable skeg, packs into a large backpack.

products.name: Inflatable Kayak Lite
products.summary: Lightweight 9 ft single inflatable kayak. Packs into a backpack for travel.
products.description: A 9 ft single-person inflatable kayak weighing 15 lbs. Drop-stitch PVC with 3 independent air chambers. Packs into a backpack for airline travel.

products.name: AirDeck 360
products.summary: Mid-size 3.6 m inflatable with an air deck. Family-friendly, planes with a 15 hp outboard.
products.description: The AirDeck 360 is the sweet-spot in our inflatable range —?long enough for four adults and a day bag, light enough for two people to launch, and fast enough to plane with a 15 hp outboard.

products.name: AirDeck 270
products.summary: Lightweight 2.7 m inflatable dinghy with a drop-stitch air deck. Stows in a car boot.
products.description: A 2.7 m inflatable with a high-pressure drop-stitch air deck. Packs down to a bag that fits in a small car boot, inflates in 10 minutes, planes with a 6 hp outboard.

technologies.title: Military-Grade PVC Fabric
technologies.summary: Multi-layer laminated PVC fabric rated for marine environments, fusion-welded to eliminate delamination.
technologies.description: Military-grade PVC is the primary material used across Wavefella inflatable products. Multi-layer lamination provides UV resistance, saltwater corrosion protection, and abrasion resistance.

technologies.title: Hypalon Tube Technology
technologies.summary: CSM rubber tubes for RIB models provide superior UV and chemical resistance compared to standard PVC.
technologies.description: Hypalon (Chlorosulfonated Polyethylene) rubber is used on Wavefella RIB models for its superior resistance to UV radiation, chemicals, and extreme temperatures.

technologies.title: Drop-Stitch Core Construction
technologies.summary: Thousands of internal polyester threads connect top and bottom layers, creating a rigid inflatable structure at 12-15 PSI.
technologies.description: Drop-stitch core is the foundational technology behind Wavefella inflatable SUP boards and kayaks. It provides rigid-body performance from an inflatable platform.

technologies.title: Air Deck Floor System
technologies.summary: High-pressure inflatable floor replacing traditional plywood or aluminum floors for reduced weight and setup time.
technologies.description: The air deck floor is a high-pressure inflatable system that replaces wooden or aluminum slat floors in dinghies, reducing weight and setup time while providing adequate rigidity.

useCases.title: Professional Marine Operations
useCases.summary: RIBs and professional-grade equipment for law enforcement, rescue, and commercial marine use.
useCases.description: Professional marine operations require rugged, high-performance vessels. Wavefella RIB 330 and RIB 450 Patrol serve law enforcement, search and rescue, and commercial transport.

useCases.title: Family Water Recreation
useCases.summary: Stable, spacious inflatables for family outings on lakes and sheltered coastal waters.
useCases.description: Family water recreation requires stable, roomy inflatables that are easy to transport and store. The Kayak Tandem and AirDeck 360 are designed for family use.

useCases.title: Coastal Touring & Exploration
useCases.summary: Longer touring boards for covering distance on open water with efficiency and tracking.
useCases.description: Coastal touring requires boards with good tracking, glide efficiency, and the ability to handle moderate chop. Wavefella Tour 12 is designed for this use case.

useCases.title: Beginner SUP Training
useCases.summary: Stable inflatable SUP platforms for first-time paddlers learning on lakes and calm coastal waters.
useCases.description: Beginner SUP training requires stable, forgiving boards that inspire confidence. Wavefella Explorer 11 and similar boards provide the wide platform needed for successful first paddling experiences.

articles.title: Expand Your Business Horizons — Become a Dealer for Hifond's Leading Brands
articles.excerpt: Hifond is actively seeking ambitious dealers nationwide to partner with our portfolio of high-quality product brands including Wavefella watersports products.

articles.title: Wavefella R&D Center — Forging the Future of Inflatable Water Sports
articles.excerpt: Wavefella's state-of-the-art R&D center drives innovation in inflatable SUP and boat design, focusing on material science, structural engineering, and sustainability.

articles.title: Wavefella Partners with US Water Rescue Association for Training Equipment
articles.excerpt: Wavefella RIBs and rescue equipment selected as standard training platforms for US Water Rescue Association chapters nationwide.

articles.title: Wavefella Launches SUP Tour 12 — A New Standard for Touring Inflatable SUPs
articles.excerpt: The SUP Tour 12 brings displacement hull performance to inflatable SUP touring. Longer, faster, and built for distance paddlers.

articles.title: Spring 2026 Paddling Gear Guide — What to Check Before Your First Launch
articles.excerpt: Prepare your SUP or kayak for the new season. A complete checklist for inspecting, inflating, and equipping your watercraft for spring paddling.

articles.title: We Are Seeking Dealers for Wavefella
articles.excerpt: Ride the Wave of Success: Become a Wavefella Dealer Across the USA! Hifond is actively seeking dynamic dealers to partner with our watersports brand.

articles.title: Wavefella Launches Recycled PVC Initiative for Sustainable Inflatable Manufacturing
articles.excerpt: A new closed-loop recycling program repurposes production PVC waste into new inflatable boards, reducing landfill impact by an estimated 40%.

articles.title: Preparing Your SUP for Summer 2026 —?Maintenance Tips for Peak Season
articles.excerpt: Get your inflatable SUP ready for heavy summer use with this maintenance guide covering UV protection, valve care, pressure management, and storage.

articles.title: Wavefella to Exhibit at Miami International Boat Show 2026
articles.excerpt: Wavefella debuts at the Miami International Boat Show with the full product lineup including RIB boats, SUPs, kayaks, and safety equipment.

articles.title: Life Vest Pro Receives Full SOLAS Certification for Commercial Marine Use
articles.excerpt: Wavefella Life Vest Pro achieves SOLAS/MED certification, opening commercial shipping, fishing, and offshore markets to the automatic inflatable life vest.

articles.title: Lake Tahoe Paddle Club Chooses Wavefella for Fleet Program
articles.excerpt: How a 200-member paddle club standardized on Wavefella SUPs and kayaks for rental and instructional fleets across multiple Lake Tahoe locations.

articles.title: Wavefella Kayak Tandem Named Best Family Watercraft 2026 by Paddle Magazine
articles.excerpt: The Kayak Tandem receives top honors in the family watercraft category for its stability, dual-cockpit design, and portable backpack form factor.

articles.title: Wavefella Manufacturing Facility Achieves ISO 14001 Environmental Management Certification
articles.excerpt: The Wavefella production facility in China earns ISO 14001:2015 certification for its environmental management systems and sustainable manufacturing processes.

articles.title: Wavefella Sponsors Great Lake SUP Challenge 2026 —?Lake Michigan Crossing
articles.excerpt: The annual 22-mile Lake Michigan SUP crossing returns with Wavefella as title sponsor, featuring a new recreational division for touring boards.

articles.title: Drop-Stitch 2.0 —?Wavefella Next Generation Core Material for Inflatable Boards
articles.excerpt: A new higher-density drop-stitch core increases board rigidity by 25% while reducing weight by 10%, setting a new benchmark for inflatable performance.
